```{r load-datasets}
# Datasets/contributors table, from local ETL output when present, else Redivis.
suppressMessages(library(dplyr))
if (file.exists("data/datasets.parquet")) {
  wb_datasets <- arrow::read_parquet("data/datasets.parquet")
} else {
  library(redivis)
  wb_datasets <- redivis$organization("datapages")$dataset("wordbank")$
    table("datasets")$to_tibble()
}
ojs_define(datasets = dplyr::select(
  wb_datasets, language, form, dataset_name, contributor, citation, license,
  n_admins))
```
